# dryui

> 144 zero-dependency Svelte 5 components with headless primitives, styled defaults, and an AI surface for lookup, composition guidance, validation, and theme diagnosis.

## Packages

- @dryui/primitives: Headless, unstyled components
- @dryui/ui: Styled components with CSS variables and theme system
- @dryui/mcp: MCP server for lookup, source retrieval, composition guidance, project planning, review, and theme diagnosis
- @dryui/cli: CLI for detect, install, project-aware add, lookup, source retrieval, composition guidance, and validation

## AI Surface

- MCP tools: info, get, list, compose, review, diagnose, detect_project, plan_install, plan_add, doctor, lint
- CLI commands: init, detect, install, add, get, info, list, compose, review, diagnose, doctor, lint

## Installation

```
bun add @dryui/ui
```

## Theme Setup

```html
<!-- In your root layout or app entry -->
<link rel="stylesheet" href="@dryui/ui/themes/default.css" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="@dryui/ui/themes/dark.css" />
```

```html
<!-- Preferred default: follow the browser/OS theme -->
<html class="theme-auto" />
```

Use `data-theme="light"` or `data-theme="dark"` only for explicit overrides. If you build a theme toggle, persist the explicit override and keep system mode as the fallback.

## Components

### Category: Action

### Button
Interactive button or link-styled action for submissions and calls to action.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/button
Props: variant ('solid' | 'outline' | 'ghost' | 'soft' | 'secondary' | 'link' | 'bare'), Button treatment from solid primary actions to ghost and inline link styles., accepted solid, outline, ghost, soft, secondary, link, bare, default 'solid' | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'icon' | 'icon-sm' | 'icon-lg'), Button density preset, including icon-only sizing variants., accepted sm, md, lg, icon, icon-sm, icon-lg, default 'md' | color ('primary' | 'danger'), Semantic tone for primary or destructive button actions., accepted primary, danger, default 'primary' | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link., When provided, Button renders an anchor instead of a button for link-style actions. | rel (string), Relationship between the current document and the linked resource. | target (string), Browsing context used for link navigation. | download (boolean | string), Requests download behavior when the component renders as a link. | type ('button' | 'submit' | 'reset'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted button, submit, reset, default 'button' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-color | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-group-orientation | data-in-group | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: Provide discernible text or an aria-label for icon-only buttons. | Use the href prop for navigation so the element keeps link semantics.
Example: <Button variant="solid" onclick={handleClick}>Save</Button>

### Toggle
Pressable toggle button.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/toggle
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | icon (Snippet) | pressed (boolean), default false, bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-size | data-state
Example: <Toggle>Content</Toggle>

### ToggleGroup
Group of toggle buttons with single/multiple selection.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/toggle-group
Parts: Root, Item
Props: Root: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | type ('single' | 'multiple'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted single, multiple, default 'single' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [], bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-size | data-state
Example: <ToggleGroup.Root>

### Clipboard
Copy text to clipboard with native Clipboard API.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/clipboard
Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | timeout (number), default 2000 | children (Snippet<[{ copied: boolean; copy: () => void }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-clipboard | data-copied
Example: <Clipboard>Content</Clipboard>

### ScrollToTop
Button that scrolls to top of page or container.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/scroll-to-top
Props: position ('bottom-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-center'), accepted bottom-right, bottom-left, bottom-center, default 'bottom-right' | class (string) | threshold (number), default 300 | target (HTMLElement | undefined), Browsing context used for link navigation. | behavior (ScrollBehavior), default 'smooth' | children (Snippet<[{ visible: boolean; scrollToTop: () => void }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-icon | data-position | data-scroll-to-top | data-visible
Example: <ScrollToTop>Content</ScrollToTop>

### FloatButton
Floating action button with expandable actions.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/float-button
Parts: Root, Trigger, Action
Props: Root: position ('bottom-right' | 'bottom-left'), accepted bottom-right, bottom-left, default 'bottom-right' | open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Action: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-float-button | data-float-button-action | data-float-button-trigger | data-position | data-size | data-state
Example: <FloatButton.Root>

### ButtonGroup
Groups related buttons with shared styling.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/button-group
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-button-group | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-size
Example: <ButtonGroup>Content</ButtonGroup>

### Chip
Interactive pill for filters, selections, and inline state.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/chip
Props: selected (boolean), Whether the current item is selected. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | variant ('solid' | 'outline' | 'soft'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted solid, outline, soft, default 'soft' | color (ChipColor), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'gray' | size ('sm' | 'md'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, default 'sm' | href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link. | rel (string), Relationship between the current document and the linked resource. | target (string), Browsing context used for link navigation. | download (boolean | string), Requests download behavior when the component renders as a link. | type ('button' | 'submit' | 'reset'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted button, submit, reset, default 'button' | onclick ((event: MouseEvent) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-chip | data-chip-wrapper | data-color | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-size | data-variant
Example: <Chip variant="soft" color="blue">Policy friendly</Chip>

### ChipGroup
Single or multi-select chip cluster.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/chip-group
Parts: Root, Item
Props: Root: size ('sm' | 'md'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, default 'sm' | type ('single' | 'multiple'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted single, multiple, default 'single' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [], bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-chip-group | data-chip-item | data-color | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-size | data-state | data-variant
Example: <ChipGroup.Root type="multiple" bind:value={selectedFilters}>

### Category: Input

### Input
Text input with size variants.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/input
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Input density preset for compact, default, or spacious form layouts., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | variant ('default' | 'ghost'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, ghost, default 'default' | value (string), Bindable text value for controlled input usage., default '', bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | type (string), Native input type such as text, email, password, or search.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-size | data-variant
Accessibility: Pair Input with a visible Label or an aria-label so the field purpose is announced. | Use native type, autocomplete, and name attributes for expected keyboard and form behavior.
Example: <Input type="email" bind:value={email} placeholder="you@example.com" />

### Textarea
Multi-line text input.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/textarea
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-size
Example: <Textarea bind:value={message} placeholder="Write a message…" />

### PromptInput
AI-style prompt input with auto-resize and submit.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/prompt-input
Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '' | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default 'Type a message...' | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | submitLabel (string), default 'Send' | onpromptsubmit ((value: string) => void) | actions (Snippet)
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-prompt-actions | data-prompt-input | data-prompt-submit | data-prompt-submit-label | data-prompt-textarea
Example: <PromptInput>Content</PromptInput>

### NumberInput
Numeric input with increment/decrement controls.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/number-input
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md', Adjusts input density and its default maximum width for compact counter-style fields. | value (number), Current controlled or bindable value., default 0, bindable | min (number), Minimum allowed value. | max (number), Maximum allowed value. | step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values., default 1 | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-number-input-wrapper | data-size
Example: <NumberInput bind:value={quantity} min={0} max={100} step={1} size="sm" />

### Checkbox
Boolean toggle input with indeterminate state.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/checkbox
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | checked (boolean), Current checked state for controlled or bindable usage., default false, bindable | indeterminate (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-size | data-state
Accessibility: Pair the checkbox with visible text or an aria-label so its purpose is announced.
Example: <Checkbox bind:checked={agreed}>I agree to the terms</Checkbox>

### RadioGroup
Single selection from multiple options.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/radio-group
Parts: Root, Item
Props: Root: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., bindable | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | required (boolean) | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-radio-group-item | data-radio-group-root | data-state
Example: <RadioGroup.Root>

### Slider
Range input slider with thumb control.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/slider
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (number), Current controlled or bindable value., default 50, bindable | min (number), Minimum allowed value., default 0 | max (number), Maximum allowed value., default 100 | step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values., default 1 | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal'
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-size
Example: <Slider bind:value={volume} min={0} max={100} />

### InputGroup
Compound input wrapper that combines prefixes, suffixes, separators, select slots, and actions.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/input-group
Parts: Root, Prefix, Input, Suffix, Separator, Action, Select
Props: Input: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '' | Select: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-affix-group | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-input-group-action | data-input-group-caret | data-input-group-input | data-input-group-inputWrap | data-input-group-prefix | data-input-group-root | data-input-group-select | data-input-group-selectWrap | data-input-group-separator | data-input-group-suffix | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-size
Example: <InputGroup.Root>

### OptionSwatchGroup
Selectable swatch tiles for choosing color, size, or other visual options.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/option-swatch-group
Parts: Root, Item, Swatch, Label, Meta
Props: Swatch: color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component. | shape ('circle' | 'rounded'), accepted circle, rounded, default 'circle' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-option-swatch-group-item | data-option-swatch-group-label | data-option-swatch-group-meta | data-option-swatch-group-root | data-option-swatch-group-rounded | data-option-swatch-group-swatch | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-part | data-state | data-unavailable | data-value
Example: <OptionSwatchGroup.Root>

### Listbox
Single or multi-select list with keyboard navigation.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/listbox
Parts: Root, Item
Props: Root: value (string | string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | multiple (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | onvaluechange ((value: string | string[]) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-listbox-item | data-listbox-root | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-value
Example: <Listbox.Root>

### PinInput
Segmented input for PIN/OTP codes with single hidden input architecture.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/pin-input
Parts: Root, Group, Cell, Separator
Props: Root: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | variant ('outline' | 'flushed'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted outline, flushed, default 'outline' | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | length (number), default 4 | mask (boolean), default false | type ('numeric' | 'alphanumeric'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted numeric, alphanumeric, default 'numeric' | pattern (RegExp) | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default '○' | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | oncomplete ((value: string) => void) | pasteTransformer ((text: string) => string) | blurOnComplete (boolean), default false | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | children (Snippet<[{ cells: PinInputCellType[] }]>), Content rendered inside the component. | Group: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Cell: cell (PinInputCellType), required | children (Snippet<[{ char: string | null; isActive: boolean; hasFakeCaret: boolean }]>), Content rendered inside the component. | Separator: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-complete | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-error | data-inactive | data-mask | data-pin-input-caret | data-pin-input-cell | data-pin-input-group | data-pin-input-hidden | data-pin-input-lg | data-pin-input-md | data-pin-input-placeholder | data-pin-input-root | data-pin-input-separator | data-pin-input-sm | data-state | data-variant
Example: <PinInput.Root bind:value={pin} length={6} oncomplete={handleVerify}>

### Rating
Star rating input with half-star support.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/rating
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (number), Current controlled or bindable value., default 0, bindable | max (number), Maximum allowed value., default 5 | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | readonly (boolean), default false | allowHalf (boolean), default false | onValueChange ((value: number) => void)
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-highlighted | data-readonly | data-size | data-state
Example: <Rating bind:value={score} />

### TimeInput
Native time input with form control integration.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/time-input
Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values. | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | class (string)
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-placeholder | data-time-display | data-time-input-wrapper | data-time-separator
Example: <TimeInput>Content</TimeInput>

### TagsInput
Input for managing a list of tags.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/tags-input
Parts: Root, Input, Tag, TagDelete, List
Props: Root: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [], bindable | maxTags (number), default 0 | allowDuplicates (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | onValueChange ((value: string[]) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Input: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered. | Tag: index (number), required | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required, bindable | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component. | TagDelete: index (number), required | value (string | undefined), Current controlled or bindable value., default '' | List: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-index | data-part | data-size
Example: <TagsInput.Root>

### FileUpload
File selection with drag-and-drop dropzone.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/file-upload
Parts: Root, Dropzone, Trigger, List, Item, ItemDelete
Props: Root: files (File[]), default [], bindable | accept (string | undefined), default '' | multiple (boolean | undefined), default false | maxSize (number | undefined), default 0 | maxFiles (number | undefined), default 0 | disabled (boolean | undefined), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | onFilesChange (((files: File[]) => void) | undefined) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Dropzone: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | List: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet<[{ file: File; index: number }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | file (File), required | index (number), required | ItemDelete: index (number), required | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-dragging | data-fu-dropzone | data-fu-item | data-fu-item-delete | data-fu-item-name | data-fu-item-size | data-fu-list | data-fu-trigger | data-index | data-size
Example: <FileUpload.Root>

### FileSelect
Select a file or folder path via external picker.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/file-select
Parts: Root, Trigger, Value, Clear
Props: Root: value (string | null), Current controlled or bindable value., default null | onrequest ((() => Promise<string | null>) | undefined) | onchange (((value: string | null) => void) | undefined) | disabled (boolean | undefined), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Value: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default 'No file selected' | Clear: children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-file-select | data-fs-clear | data-fs-trigger | data-fs-value | data-loading | data-placeholder | data-size
Example: <FileSelect.Root>

### ColorPicker
Color selection with area, hue/alpha sliders, and eyedropper.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/color-picker
Parts: Root, Area, HueSlider, AlphaSlider, Input, Swatch, EyeDropper, ChannelInput
Props: Root: width (number) | areaHeight (number) | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '#ff0000', bindable | alpha (number), default 1, bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Area: width (number), default 200 | height (number), default 150 | Input: format ('hex' | 'rgb' | 'hsl'), accepted hex, rgb, hsl, default 'hex' | Swatch: color (string | undefined), Semantic color or tone applied to the component. | EyeDropper: children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component. | ChannelInput: channel ('h' | 's' | 'v'), accepted h, s, v, required
Data attributes: data-channel | data-color-picker | data-cp-area | data-cp-area-canvas | data-cp-area-indicator | data-cp-eyedropper | data-cp-input | data-cp-slider | data-cp-slider-wrapper | data-cp-swatch | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-format | data-interactive
Example: <ColorPicker.Root>

### DropZone
Drag-and-drop file drop zone area.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/drop-zone
Props: accept (string) | onDrop ((files: File[]) => void)
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-drop-zone | data-drop-zone-text
Example: <DropZone>Content</DropZone>

### Transfer
Dual-list transfer component for moving items between lists.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/transfer
Parts: Root, List, Item, Actions
Props: Root: sourceItems (import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[]), default [], required, bindable | targetItems (import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[]), default [], bindable | onChange (() | source (import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[],), required | target (import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[]), Browsing context used for link navigation., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | List: filterable (boolean), default false | content (Snippet<[{ items: TransferItemType[] }]>) | type ('source' | 'target'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted source, target, required | title (string | undefined), Primary heading or label text. | children (Snippet<[{ items: import('./context.svelte.js').TransferItem[] }]> | undefined), Content rendered inside the component. | Item: key (string), required | type ('source' | 'target'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted source, target, required | disabled (boolean | undefined), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Actions: moveToTarget (() => void), required | moveToSource (() => void), required | moveAllToTarget (() => void), required | moveAllToSource (() => void), required | canMoveToTarget (boolean), required | canMoveToSource (boolean), required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-part | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-transfer-actions | data-transfer-count | data-transfer-item | data-transfer-list | data-transfer-list-content | data-transfer-list-header | data-transfer-move-all-source | data-transfer-move-all-target | data-transfer-move-source | data-transfer-move-target | data-transfer-root | data-transfer-select-all | data-type
Example: <Transfer.Root>

### RichTextEditor
Basic rich text editor with formatting toolbar.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/rich-text-editor
Parts: Root, Toolbar, Content
Props: Root: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default '' | readonly (boolean) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Toolbar: children (Snippet<[ToolbarSnippetParams]>), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-format | data-part | data-placeholder | data-readonly | data-rte-content | data-rte-root | data-rte-toolbar
Example: <RichTextEditor.Root>

### PhoneInput
Phone number input with country code selector.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/phone-input
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | defaultCountry (string), default 'US' | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default 'Phone number' | countries (CountryInfo[]) | onchange ((value: string) => void)
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-phone-chevron | data-phone-dial-code | data-phone-flag | data-phone-input | data-phone-number-input | data-phone-select | data-phone-trigger | data-size
Example: <PhoneInput bind:value={phone} defaultCountry="US" placeholder="(555) 123-4567" />

### CountrySelect
Country selector dropdown with flags and dial codes.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/country-select
Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., default '', bindable | regions (string[]) | showDialCode (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default 'Select country' | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | onchange ((code: string) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-country-select-wrapper | data-part | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.)
Example: <CountrySelect bind:value={country} placeholder="Select country" />

### DateTimeInput
Combined date and time input with locale-aware segments.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/date-time-input
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (Date), Current controlled or bindable value., default $bindable(new Date()), bindable | min (Date), Minimum allowed value. | max (Date), Maximum allowed value. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | locale (string), default 'en-US' | name (string), Field name used during native form submission.
Data attributes: data-date-time-input | data-part
Example: <DateTimeInput bind:value={appointmentDate} name="appointment" />

### AlphaSlider
Slider for selecting alpha/opacity values in color pickers.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/alpha-slider
Props: value (number), Current controlled or bindable value., default 100 | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'hsl(230 | min (number), Minimum allowed value., default 0 | max (number), Maximum allowed value., default 100 | step (number), Step interval used when incrementing numeric values., default 1 | onchange ((value: number) => void)
Data attributes: data-alpha-slider | data-alpha-slider-checkerboard | data-alpha-slider-color-track | data-alpha-slider-input | data-alpha-slider-meta | data-alpha-slider-swatch | data-alpha-slider-swatch-wrapper | data-alpha-slider-track-wrapper | data-alpha-slider-value-label
Example: <AlphaSlider>Content</AlphaSlider>

Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-error | data-field | data-field-description | data-field-error
Example: <Field.Root>

### Select
Closed dropdown select for choosing one option from a fixed list.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/select
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content, Item, Value
Props: Root: open (boolean), Controls whether the select menu is currently expanded., default false, bindable | value (string), Bindable selected value for the current option set., default '', bindable | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | name (string), Field name used during native form submission., Adds a hidden input so the selected value participates in native form submission. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: placement (Placement), default 'bottom-start' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Value: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default ''
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-indicator | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-placeholder | data-select-content | data-select-item | data-select-trigger | data-select-trigger-wrap | data-select-value | data-select-wrapper | data-size | data-state (Reflects whether the select surface is expanded or whether an option is active, depending on the part., values open, closed, checked, unchecked) | data-value
Accessibility: Provide surrounding field context and a name when the selected value needs to submit with a form.
Example: <Select.Root bind:value={selected} bind:open={selectOpen} name="selection">

### MultiSelectCombobox
Searchable multi-select combobox with removable selected tokens.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/multi-select-combobox
Parts: Root, Input, Content, Group, Item, Empty, SelectionList, SelectionItem, SelectionRemove
Props: Root: value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [] | query (string), default '' | open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | name (string), Field name used during native form submission. | maxSelections (number), default 0 | onvaluechange ((value: string[]) => void) | onquerychange ((query: string) => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Input: placeholder (string), Hint text shown when no value is selected or entered., default '' | Content: placement (Placement), default 'bottom-start' | offset (number), default 4 | loading (boolean), default false | loadingContent (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Group: label (string), Visible label text shown for the control or item., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | textValue (string) | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | icon (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Empty: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | SelectionList: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | SelectionItem: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component. | SelectionRemove: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | label (string | undefined), Visible label text shown for the control or item.
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-empty | data-highlighted | data-multi-select-content | data-multi-select-empty | data-multi-select-group | data-multi-select-input | data-multi-select-item | data-multi-select-root | data-multi-select-selection-item | data-multi-select-selection-list | data-multi-select-selection-remove | data-multi-select-wrapper | data-part | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-state | data-text-value | data-value
Example: <MultiSelectCombobox.Root bind:value={selectedFrameworks} bind:query={frameworkQuery} name="frameworks">

### DateField

Subpath import: @dryui/ui/date-field

Props: Root: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | value (Date | null), Current controlled or bindable value., default $bindable<Date | null>(null), bindable | name (string), Field name used during native form submission., Adds a hidden input so the selected date participates in native form submission as YYYY-MM-DD. | locale (string), default 'en-US' | min (Date | null), Minimum allowed value., default null | max (Date | null), Maximum allowed value., default null | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Segment: type ('month' | 'day' | 'year'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted month, day, year, required | Separator: separator (string)
Data attributes: data-df-root | data-df-segment | data-df-separator | data-df-wrapper | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-invalid (Present when the current field value is invalid.) | data-placeholder | data-segment | data-separator | data-size
Example: <DateField.Root bind:value={departureDate} name="departureDate">

### Aurora
Ambient gradient surface with browser-native animated color fields and static fallback.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/aurora
Props: palette (AuroraPalette), default 'cosmic' | speed (AuroraSpeed), default 'normal' | intensity (number), default 80 | waviness (number), default 50 | colorSpace (AuroraColorSpace), default 'srgb' | blendMode (BlendMode) | layerOpacity (number) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-animated | data-aurora | data-aurora-backdrop | data-aurora-content | data-aurora-layer | data-color-space | data-layer | data-palette | data-reduced-motion
Example: <Aurora palette="ocean">

### Noise
Texture overlay that adds grain and atmosphere to surfaces without external assets.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/noise
Props: opacity (number), default 0.22 | blend (NoiseBlendMode), default 'overlay' | animated (boolean), default false | grain (NoiseGrain), default 'medium' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-animated | data-grain | data-noise | data-noise-content | data-noise-texture | data-reduced-motion
Example: <Noise opacity={0.12} blend="soft-light">

### Category: Navigation

### Tabs
Tabbed content navigation.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/tabs
Parts: Root, List, Trigger, Content
Props: Root: value (string), Bindable current tab value for controlled tab interfaces., default '' | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'horizontal' | activationMode ('automatic' | 'manual'), accepted automatic, manual, default 'automatic' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | List: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: value (string), Tab identifier that activates the matching content panel., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-size | data-state (Reflects whether the tab trigger or panel is active., values active, inactive) | data-tabs-content | data-tabs-list | data-tabs-root | data-tabs-trigger | data-tabs-trigger-content
Accessibility: Give each Tabs.Trigger concise, descriptive text so keyboard and screen-reader users can scan options quickly. | Keep Tabs.List and Tabs.Content as siblings under Tabs.Root to preserve roving focus and aria wiring.
Example: <Tabs.Root bind:value={activeTab}>

Subpath import: @dryui/ui/breadcrumb
Parts: Root, List, Item, Link, Separator
Props: Root: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | List: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Link: href (string), Destination URL when the component renders as a link. | current (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Separator: children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-breadcrumb | data-breadcrumb-current | data-breadcrumb-item | data-breadcrumb-link | data-breadcrumb-list | data-breadcrumb-separator
Example: <Breadcrumb.Root>

Example: <Stepper.Root bind:activeStep={activeStep}>

### Sidebar

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/sidebar
Parts: Root, Header, Content, Footer, Group, GroupLabel, Item, Trigger
Props: Root: collapsed (boolean), default false, bindable | side ('left' | 'right'), Preferred side for overlay placement., accepted left, right, default 'left' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Header: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Footer: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Group: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | GroupLabel: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: active (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-collapsed | data-side (Indicates the resolved placement side for the overlay surface., values top, right, bottom, left) | data-sidebar | data-sidebar-content | data-sidebar-footer | data-sidebar-group | data-sidebar-group-label | data-sidebar-header | data-sidebar-item | data-sidebar-trigger | data-state
Example: <Sidebar.Root>

### TableOfContents
Auto-generated table of contents from headings.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/table-of-contents
Parts: Root, List, Item
Props: Root: selector (string), default 'main' | headingSelector (string), default 'h2 | rootMargin (string), default '0px 0px -80% 0px' | autoId (boolean), default true | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: heading (import('./context.svelte.js').TocHeading), required | children (Snippet<[{ heading: import('./context.svelte.js').TocHeading; active: boolean }]>), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-level | data-part
Example: <TableOfContents.Root>

### Link

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/link
Props: underline ('always' | 'hover' | 'none'), accepted always, hover, none, default 'always' | external (boolean), default false | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-underline
Example: <Link>Content</Link>

### MegaMenu
Horizontal navigation with large dropdown panels and columns.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/mega-menu
Parts: Root, Item, Trigger, Panel, Column, Link
Props: Root: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Panel: fullWidth (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Column: title (string), Primary heading or label text. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Link: icon (Snippet) | description (Snippet), Supporting copy that explains the current control or section. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-full-width | data-mega-menu-column | data-mega-menu-item | data-mega-menu-link | data-mega-menu-panel | data-mega-menu-root | data-mega-menu-trigger | data-part | data-state
Example: <MegaMenu.Root>

### Category: Overlay

### Dialog
Modal dialog using native dialog element.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/dialog
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content, Overlay, Header, Body, Footer, Close
Props: Root: open (boolean), Controls whether the dialog is currently shown., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Interactive element that opens the dialog., required | Content: children (Snippet), Main dialog surface content rendered inside the modal., required | Header: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Body: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Footer: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Close: children (Snippet), Label or content rendered inside the dismiss control., required
Data attributes: data-dialog-body | data-dialog-content | data-dialog-footer | data-dialog-header | data-dialog-panel | data-dialog-trigger | data-state (Reflects whether the dialog is open or closed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Always provide a clear heading so the dialog context is announced when it opens. | Ensure there is an obvious close path for both keyboard and pointer users.
Example: <Dialog.Root bind:open={showDialog}>

### AlertDialog
Modal dialog requiring user confirmation.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/alert-dialog
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content, Overlay, Header, Body, Footer, Action, Cancel
Props: Root: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Header: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Body: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Footer: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Action: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Cancel: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-alert-dialog-action | data-alert-dialog-body | data-alert-dialog-cancel | data-alert-dialog-content | data-alert-dialog-footer | data-alert-dialog-header | data-alert-dialog-overlay | data-alert-dialog-trigger | data-state
Example: <AlertDialog.Root>

### Popover
Floating content panel anchored to a trigger.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/popover
Parts: Root, Trigger, Content
Props: Root: open (boolean), Whether the overlay or disclosure is currently open., default false, bindable | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: placement (Placement), default 'bottom' | offset (number), default 8 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-popover-content | data-popover-trigger | data-state (Reflects whether the popover is open or closed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Avoid placing essential actions in hover-only or transient content; keyboard users must be able to reopen the popover.
Example: <Popover.Root bind:open={popoverOpen}>

### Category: Display

### Card

Subpath import: @dryui/ui/card
Parts: Root, Header, Content, Footer
Props: Root: as ('div' | 'a' | 'button'), Underlying HTML element to render for the component., accepted div, a, button, default 'div' | selected (boolean), Applies selected-state styling for interactive card surfaces. | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling. | orientation ('vertical' | 'horizontal'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted vertical, horizontal | variant ('default' | 'elevated' | 'interactive'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, elevated, interactive, default 'default' | size ('default' | 'sm'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted default, sm, default 'default' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Header: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | noPadding (boolean), default false | Footer: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-card | data-card-content | data-card-footer | data-card-header | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-no-padding | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-size | data-variant
Example: <Card.Root>

### Accordion
Collapsible content sections, single or multiple mode.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/accordion
Parts: Root, Item, Trigger, Content
Props: Root: type ('single' | 'multiple'), Accordion behavior mode for single or multiple expanded items., accepted single, multiple, default 'single' | value (string[]), Current controlled or bindable value., default [] | orientation ('horizontal' | 'vertical'), Horizontal or vertical layout direction., accepted horizontal, vertical, default 'vertical' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | disabled (boolean), Prevents interaction and applies disabled styling., default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Trigger: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Content: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-accordion | data-accordion-content | data-accordion-content-inner | data-accordion-item | data-accordion-trigger | data-disabled (Present when the component or part is disabled.) | data-indicator | data-orientation (Reflects the current horizontal or vertical orientation., values horizontal, vertical) | data-state (Reflects whether the current accordion item is expanded or collapsed., values open, closed)
Accessibility: Use descriptive trigger text so the hidden content is understandable before expansion. | Keep each trigger paired with its matching content so keyboard and screen-reader relationships stay intact.
Example: <Accordion.Root>

### Avatar

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/avatar
Props: src (string), Source URL for image, video, or other media content. | alt (string), Accessible alternative text announced when the media itself is not visible., default '' | fallback (string) | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | shape ('circle' | 'square'), accepted circle, square, default 'circle' | status ('online' | 'offline' | 'busy' | 'away'), accepted online, offline, busy, away | badge (Snippet) | children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-avatar | data-avatar-badge | data-avatar-status | data-avatar-wrapper | data-shape | data-size | data-status
Example: <Avatar src="/avatar.jpg" alt="Jane" fallback="JD" />

Example: <Badge variant="soft">Active</Badge>

### Chart

Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/chart
Parts: Root, Bars, Line, Area, Donut, StackedBar, HorizontalBar, XAxis, YAxis
Props: Root: data (import('@dryui/primitives').ChartDataPoint[]), required | width (number) | height (number) | padding ({ top?: number; right?: number; bottom?: number; left?: number }) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Bars: radius (number), default 2 | onclick ((event: { label: string; value: number; index: number }) => void) | Line: strokeWidth (number), default 2 | showDots (boolean), default true | dotRadius (number), default 3 | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'currentColor' | Area: strokeWidth (number), default 2 | showDots (boolean), default false | dotRadius (number), default 3 | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'currentColor' | Donut: innerRadius (number), default 60 | outerRadius (number), default 80 | label (Snippet<[{ total: number }]>), Visible label text shown for the control or item. | onclick ((event: { label: string; value: number; index: number }) => void) | StackedBar: stackedData (import('@dryui/primitives').ChartStackedDataPoint[]), required | radius (number), default 2 | HorizontalBar: radius (number), default 2 | YAxis: ticks (number)
Data attributes: data-chart | data-chart-area | data-chart-axis | data-chart-bars | data-chart-container | data-chart-donut | data-chart-donut-label | data-chart-horizontal-bar | data-chart-line | data-chart-stacked-bar | data-clickable | data-part
Example: <Chart.Root>

### Typography
Standalone semantic text exports: heading, text, code, blockquote.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/typography
Parts: Heading, Text, Code, Blockquote
Namespace parts only: no Root wrapper
Props: Heading: variant ('default' | 'display'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, display | level (1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6), Heading level used to render semantic h1 through h6 output., accepted 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Text: color ('default' | 'muted' | 'secondary'), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., accepted default, muted, secondary, Use muted or secondary for supporting copy without reaching for inline color styles. | variant ('default' | 'muted' | 'secondary'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, muted, secondary | size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, Applies DryUI text scale tokens for compact or emphasized body copy. | as ('p' | 'span' | 'div'), Text element to render for inline, block, or paragraph copy., accepted p, span, div | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Code: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Blockquote: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-as | data-color | data-level | data-size | data-variant
Example: <Typography.Heading level={2}>Launch readiness</Typography.Heading>

### Heading
Standalone semantic heading export for starter-kit typography.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/heading
Props: level (1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5 | 6), Semantic heading level to render., accepted 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, default 2 | variant ('default' | 'display'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, display, default 'default' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-level | data-variant
Example: <Heading level={2}>Launch readiness</Heading>

### Text
Standalone body copy export for starter-kit typography.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/text
Props: as ('p' | 'span' | 'div'), Underlying HTML element to render for the component., accepted p, span, div, default 'p' | color ('default' | 'muted' | 'secondary'), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., accepted default, muted, secondary, default 'default', Use muted or secondary for supporting copy without reaching for inline color styles. | size ('xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted xs, sm, md, lg, default 'md', Applies DryUI text scale tokens for compact or emphasized body copy. | font ('sans' | 'mono'), accepted sans, mono, default 'sans' | weight ('normal' | 'medium' | 'semibold' | 'bold'), accepted normal, medium, semibold, bold | variant ('default' | 'label'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted default, label, default 'default' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-color | data-font | data-size | data-variant | data-weight
Example: <Text as="p" color="secondary" size="sm">Use Text for supporting copy, labels, and starter-kit body content.</Text>

### DescriptionList
Responsive term and value list for summaries and specs.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/description-list
Parts: Root, Item, Term, Description
Props: Root: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Item: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Term: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Description: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-description-list | data-description-list-dd | data-description-list-item | data-description-list-term
Example: <DescriptionList.Root>

### Reveal
IntersectionObserver-powered entry transitions with reduced-motion and no-dependency fallbacks.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/reveal
Props: variant (RevealVariant), Visual style preset for the component., default 'fade' | once (boolean), default true | threshold (number), default 0.18 | delay (number) | duration (number) | distance (number | string) | blendMode (BlendMode) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-reduced-motion | data-reveal | data-variant | data-visible
Example: <Reveal variant="slide-up" delay={120}>

### Spotlight
Pointer-reactive radial highlight surface for cards, hero blocks, and interactive panels.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/spotlight
Props: radius (number), default 260 | intensity (number), default 26 | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'rgba(59 | followPointer (boolean), default true | blendMode (BlendMode) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-active (Present on the active item or current target within the component.) | data-follow-pointer | data-spotlight | data-static
Example: <Spotlight intensity={32}>

### Marquee
Scrolling text/content ticker with CSS animations.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/marquee
Props: speed (number), default 50 | direction ('left' | 'right' | 'up' | 'down'), accepted left, right, up, down, default 'left' | pauseOnHover (boolean), default false | fade (boolean), default false | gap (string), default '1rem' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-direction | data-fade | data-marquee | data-marquee-content | data-marquee-track | data-pause-on-hover | data-reduced-motion
Example: <Marquee>Content</Marquee>

### QRCode
QR code generator using Canvas 2D API.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/qr-code
Props: value (string), Current controlled or bindable value., required | size (number), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., default 200 | errorCorrection ('L' | 'M' | 'Q' | 'H'), accepted L, M, Q, H, default 'M' | fgColor (string), default '#000' | bgColor (string), default '#fff'
Data attributes: data-qr-canvas | data-qr-wrapper | data-value
Example: <QRCode>Content</QRCode>

Data attributes: data-code-block | data-code-block-code | data-code-block-copy | data-code-block-header | data-code-block-language | data-code-block-line-content | data-code-block-line-number | data-code-block-pre | data-code-block-token-link | data-copied | data-language | data-single-line | data-token-type
Example: <CodeBlock>Content</CodeBlock>

Example: <VirtualList>Content</VirtualList>

Data attributes: data-infinite-scroll | data-is-end-message | data-is-indicator | data-is-sentinel
Example: <InfiniteScroll>Content</InfiniteScroll>

### DataGrid
Enhanced table with sorting, filtering, and pagination.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/data-grid
Parts: Root, Table, Header, Column, Body, Row, Cell, Pagination, SelectAll, SelectCell, ExpandableRow, ExpandTrigger
Props: Root: striped (boolean), default false | items (T[]), required | pageSize (number), default 10 | selectable (boolean), default false | onSelectionChange ((selected: string[]) => void) | actionBar (Snippet<[{ selectedCount: number; clearSelection: () => void }]>) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Table: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Header: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Column: key (string), required | sortable (boolean), default false | filterable (boolean), default false | pinned (boolean), default false | resizable (boolean), default false | header (Snippet) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Body: children (Snippet<[{ items: T[]; page: number }]>), Content rendered inside the component., required | Row: rowId (string) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Cell: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Pagination: page (number), required | totalPages (number), required | totalItems (number), required | pageSize (number), required | canPrevious (boolean), required | canNext (boolean), required | previous (() => void), required | next (() => void), required | goto ((page: number) => void), required | SelectCell: rowId (string), required | rowLabel (string) | ExpandableRow: rowId (string), required | expandable (Snippet), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | ExpandTrigger: rowId (string), required | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-data-grid | data-dg-body | data-dg-cell | data-dg-column | data-dg-expand | data-dg-header | data-dg-pagination | data-dg-row | data-dg-select-cell | data-dg-table | data-expanded | data-filter-input | data-pagination-info | data-pagination-next | data-pagination-prev | data-part | data-pinned | data-resizable | data-resizing | data-row-id | data-selected (Present when the current item is selected.) | data-sort-indicator | data-sort-trigger | data-sortable | data-sorted | data-striped
Example: <DataGrid.Root>

Example: <Carousel.Root>

Props: date (Date | string | number), required | locale (string), default 'en' | weekday ('long' | 'short' | 'narrow'), accepted long, short, narrow | era ('long' | 'short' | 'narrow'), accepted long, short, narrow | year ('numeric' | '2-digit'), accepted numeric, 2-digit | month ('numeric' | '2-digit' | 'long' | 'short' | 'narrow'), accepted numeric, 2-digit, long, short, narrow | day ('numeric' | '2-digit'), accepted numeric, 2-digit | hour ('numeric' | '2-digit'), accepted numeric, 2-digit | minute ('numeric' | '2-digit'), accepted numeric, 2-digit | second ('numeric' | '2-digit'), accepted numeric, 2-digit | timeZoneName ('long' | 'short'), accepted long, short | timeZone (string) | hourCycle ('h11' | 'h12' | 'h23' | 'h24'), accepted h11, h12, h23, h24 | dateStyle ('full' | 'long' | 'medium' | 'short'), accepted full, long, medium, short | timeStyle ('full' | 'long' | 'medium' | 'short'), accepted full, long, medium, short
Data attributes: data-format-date
Example: <FormatDate>Content</FormatDate>

Example: <Gauge value={72} min={0} max={100} thresholds={[{ value: 30, color: "red" }, { value: 70, color: "orange" }, { value: 90, color: "green" }]} />

### VideoEmbed

Example: <VideoEmbed src="https://youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ" provider="youtube" title="Video title" />

### Map
Interactive map container with markers, popups, layers, and controls.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/map
Parts: Root, Marker, Popup, Layer, Controls
Props: Root: center (LngLat), default [0 | zoom (number), default 2 | minZoom (number) | maxZoom (number) | mapStyle (string) | createMap ((container: HTMLDivElement, options: MapOptions) => MapInstance) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | Marker: position (LngLat), required | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component. | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | class (string) | Popup: maxWidth (string), default '20rem' | closeButton (boolean), default true | closeOnClick (boolean), default true | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | class (string) | Layer: id (string), Unique HTML id used for labels, aria relationships, or targeted styling., required | type ('heatmap' | 'polygon' | 'fill' | 'circle' | 'line'), HTML type attribute or component-specific type selector., accepted heatmap, polygon, fill, circle, line, required | data (GeoJsonData), required | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component. | opacity (number) | Controls: position ('top-left' | 'top-right' | 'bottom-left' | 'bottom-right'), accepted top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right, default 'top-right' | navigation (boolean), default false | fullscreen (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-map-root | data-part
Example: <Map.Root center={[-122.4, 37.8]} zoom={12}>

Data attributes: data-connector | data-connector-label | data-connector-line | data-edge-row | data-empty | data-focused | data-node | data-node-helper | data-node-name | data-orphans | data-system-map
Example: <SystemMap>Content</SystemMap>

### Category: Feedback

### Alert
Contextual feedback message with variant styling.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/alert
Parts: Root, Icon, Title, Description, Close
Props: Root: variant (AlertVariant), Visual style preset for the component., default 'info' | dismissible (boolean), default false | onDismiss (() => void) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Icon: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Title: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Description: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Close: children (Snippet | undefined), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-alert | data-alert-close | data-alert-description | data-alert-icon | data-alert-title | data-dismissible | data-variant
Example: <Alert.Root variant="info"><Alert.Description>Your changes have been saved.</Alert.Description></Alert.Root>

### Toast
Temporary notification message.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/toast
Parts: Provider, Root, Title, Description, Close, Action
Props: Provider: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component. | Root: id (string), Unique HTML id used for labels, aria relationships, or targeted styling., required | variant ('info' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'error'), Visual style preset for the component., accepted info, success, warning, error, default 'info' | persistent (boolean) | progress (number) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Title: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Description: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Close: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | Action: children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | onclick (() => void)
Data attributes: data-part | data-persistent | data-position | data-removing | data-toast-id | data-variant
Accessibility: Do not rely on toast content as the only place critical workflow information appears.
Example: <Toast.Root>

### Progress
Progress bar indicator.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/progress
Props: size ('sm' | 'md' | 'lg'), Size preset affecting density, spacing, or typography., accepted sm, md, lg, default 'md' | color ('blue' | 'green' | 'red' | 'yellow'), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., accepted blue, green, red, yellow, default 'blue' | value (number | undefined), Current controlled or bindable value. | max (number), Maximum allowed value., default 100 | segments (ProgressSegment[]) | thresholds (ProgressThreshold[]) | showLabel (boolean | 'inside' | 'outside')
Data attributes: data-color | data-has-label | data-max | data-part | data-position | data-segmented | data-size | data-state | data-value | data-with-label
Example: <Progress value={65} max={100} />

### Category: Visual

### ChromaticShift

Example: <ChromaticShift>Content</ChromaticShift>

### ChromaticAberration

Subpath import: @dryui/ui/chromatic-aberration
