Data attributes: data-chromatic-aberration | data-chromatic-aberration-svg
Example: <ChromaticAberration>Content</ChromaticAberration>

### Displacement
SVG turbulence displacement filter for organic distortion effects.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/displacement
Props: scale (number), default 12 | turbulence (DisplacementTurbulence), default 'medium' | animated (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-animated | data-displacement | data-displacement-svg | data-reduced-motion | data-turbulence
Example: <Displacement>Content</Displacement>

### Glow
Soft glow effect wrapper with configurable color, intensity, and animation.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/glow
Props: color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'var(--dry-color-fill-brand)' | intensity (number), default 50 | radius (number), default 20 | blendMode (BlendMode), default 'screen' | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-glow
Example: <Glow>Content</Glow>

### Adjust
CSS filter adjustment wrapper for brightness, contrast, saturation, and hue shifts.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/adjust
Props: brightness (number) | contrast (number) | saturate (number) | hueRotate (number) | grayscale (number) | sepia (number) | invert (number) | blur (number) | blendMode (BlendMode) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-adjust
Example: <Adjust>Content</Adjust>

### Beam
Animated linear light streak surface for directional highlights and shimmer accents.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/beam
Props: color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'var(--dry-color-fill-brand)' | width (number), default 2 | angle (number), default 45 | speed (number), default 3 | intensity (number), default 70 | blendMode (BlendMode) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-beam | data-beam-layer
Example: <Beam>Content</Beam>

### Glass
Translucent glass wrapper with blur, tint, and saturation control.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/glass
Props: blur (number), default 12 | tint (string), default 'rgba(255 | saturation (number), default 120 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required
Data attributes: data-glass
Example: <Glass>Content</Glass>

### GodRays
Volumetric radial light rays surface with configurable origin, spread, and intensity.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/god-rays
Props: color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component. | rayCount (number) | intensity (number) | center ({ x: number; y: number }) | speed (number) | blendMode (BlendMode) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-animated | data-god-rays | data-god-rays-layer
Example: <GodRays>Content</GodRays>

### GradientMesh
Animated multi-color gradient mesh background with optional interactivity.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/gradient-mesh
Props: colors (readonly [string, string, string, string]), default ['#7b68ee' | speed (GradientMeshSpeed), default 'normal' | interactive (boolean), default false | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-animated | data-gradient-mesh | data-gradient-mesh-content | data-interactive | data-reduced-motion
Example: <GradientMesh>Content</GradientMesh>

### Halftone
SVG halftone dot pattern overlay with configurable size, angle, and color.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/halftone
Props: dotSize (HalftoneDotSize), default 'medium' | angle (number), default 45 | color (string), Semantic color or tone applied to the component., default 'currentColor' | opacity (number), default 0.3 | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-dot-size | data-halftone | data-halftone-content
Example: <Halftone>Content</Halftone>

### MaskReveal
Intersection-observer mask transition with circle, diamond, or wipe shapes.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/mask-reveal
Props: shape (MaskRevealShape), default 'circle' | direction ('in' | 'out'), accepted in, out, default 'in' | once (boolean), default true | threshold (number), default 0.18 | duration (number) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component.
Data attributes: data-direction | data-mask-reveal | data-reduced-motion | data-revealed | data-shape
Example: <MaskReveal>Content</MaskReveal>

### ShaderCanvas
WebGL shader canvas with built-in presets and theme color integration.
Import: @dryui/ui
Subpath import: @dryui/ui/shader-canvas
Props: fragmentShader (string) | vertexShader (PrimitiveShaderCanvasProps['vertexShader']) | autoUniforms (PrimitiveShaderCanvasProps['autoUniforms']) | uniforms (PrimitiveShaderCanvasProps['uniforms']) | pixelRatio (PrimitiveShaderCanvasProps['pixelRatio']) | fps (PrimitiveShaderCanvasProps['fps']) | paused (PrimitiveShaderCanvasProps['paused']) | fallback (PrimitiveShaderCanvasProps['fallback']) | children (Snippet), Content rendered inside the component., required | preset (ShaderCanvasPreset) | themeColors (boolean) | aspectRatio (string)
Data attributes: data-shader-canvas | data-shader-canvas-root
Example: <ShaderCanvas>Content</ShaderCanvas>

## CSS Variables

All components support CSS variable theming. Override at the :root level or component level:

```css
:root {
  --dry-btn-radius: 8px;
  --dry-btn-bg: #6366f1;
}
```

## CLI

Use the CLI for deterministic project detection, install planning, project-aware add planning, source retrieval, composition guidance, and validation.

All commands support `--toon` for token-optimized agent output and `--full` to disable truncation. Most also accept `--json`.

Current command surface: init, detect, install, add, get, info, list, compose, review, diagnose, doctor, lint.

```
bunx @dryui/cli detect --toon <project-path>
bunx @dryui/cli install --toon <project-path>
bunx @dryui/cli add --project --target <file> Card
bunx @dryui/cli info <component> --toon
bunx @dryui/cli list --toon --category layout
bunx @dryui/cli compose "date input" --toon
bunx @dryui/cli review --toon src/routes/+page.svelte
bunx @dryui/cli diagnose --toon src/app.css
bunx @dryui/cli doctor --toon --changed
bunx @dryui/cli lint --toon --max-severity warning
```

## MCP Server & Skill

dryui ships an MCP server (live tools) and a skill (conventions). All MCP output uses TOON (token-optimized) format with contextual next-step suggestions.

### Install

- **Claude Code**: `claude plugin marketplace add rob-balfre/dryui && claude plugin install dryui@dryui` (plugin bundles skill + MCP)
- **Codex**: `$skill-installer install https://github.com/rob-balfre/dryui/tree/main/packages/ui/skills/dryui` then `codex mcp add dryui -- npx -y @dryui/mcp`
- **Copilot / Cursor / Windsurf**: `npx degit rob-balfre/dryui/packages/ui/skills/dryui .agents/skills/dryui` + add MCP config
- **Zed**: MCP only (reads AGENTS.md for conventions)

MCP config for tools that need it manually: `"command": "npx", "args": ["-y", "@dryui/mcp"]` — root key varies by tool (mcpServers for Cursor/Windsurf, servers for Copilot, context_servers for Zed).

Available MCP tools:
- info: Inspect component APIs, props, parts, CSS vars, and examples
- get: Retrieve copyable source for a composed output
- list: Discover components and source-owned catalog entries
- compose: Get composition guidance for the right components and patterns
- review: Review Svelte components for DryUI spec compliance and best practices
- diagnose: Diagnose theme CSS for missing tokens, contrast issues, and value errors
- detect_project: Detect DryUI readiness in a Svelte or SvelteKit project
- plan_install: Build a non-mutating install checklist for a project
- plan_add: Build a non-mutating project-aware adoption plan for a component or composed output
- doctor: Audit a DryUI workspace and return a structured health report
- lint: Lint a DryUI workspace and return deterministic workspace findings
